prompt: Tap flop left for out-of-position depth context.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before stack-depth action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_left is the board anchor because the first texture cue tells you whether the out-of-position range has enough coverage to continue.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The left flop card is the right anchor here because the initial texture anchor tells you whether the out-of-position range has enough coverage to continue.
